title: Migration Classification
description: Deterministic split produced by classify.py from analysis.json + dax-partial.json. Tells the agent gap-fill step exactly what is left to author (route='agent') and what is already handled deterministically (route='deterministic'). Routing is binary: every non-easy item goes to a single batched agent call (Sonnet); Opus is a reactive fallback only when merge validation fails.

tableMap.description: Canonical table names shared by the DAX and schema steps so measures and tables agree on naming.

fact.description: host table for measures (single-flat: the one table; star: best-guess fact, agent may refine)

route.description: deterministic => star_det produced it (single-flat); agent => needs design

hint.description: pattern tag to enrich the agent prompt only (e.g. lod-fixed, table-calc); never changes routing
